$comment: Semantic diff rules — define acceptable differences between source and target outputs. Copy to artifacts/semantic-diff-rules.json and customize for your migration.

rules.description: Allow trailing space differences in alphanumeric fields
rules._note: Enable if your target trims trailing spaces differently than the source
Enable if source and target run on different platforms

rules.description: Example: allow 0.01 tolerance on a numeric field at offset 60, length 9
rules._note: Customize offset, length, and tolerance for your fields

rules.description: Example: source uses YYYYMMDD, target uses YYYY-MM-DD
